# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Catch the ultimate beach lifestyle clothing for surfers with bold 2000s graphics and vibrant surf energy. Shop Surf A Wave Co. and wear the wave every day.

### Style & Craft
https://example.com/style-craft
Explore surf wearable accessories online and apparel built with raw coastal creativity. Every stitch channels early 2000s surf culture — designed to turn heads on the shore.

### About
https://example.com/about
Discover the story behind one of the best surf clothing brands in the US. Surf A Wave Co. was forged in nostalgia, shaped by waves, and driven by that unstoppable early 2000s beach spirit.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Got questions about our surf wearable accessories online or want to collab with a legendary surf lifestyle brand? Reach out to Surf A Wave Co. and let&#39;s make waves together.

### Products
https://example.com/products
Our Products - Surf A Wave Co.
